title: 打破技术数据壁垒！
description: 智汇信研究院向个人用户免费开放其高级搜索和人工智能深度分析的核心功能，包括人工智能专利检索、人工智能辅助阅读、图表分析、多智能体协作等，赋能高效研发和情报分析，降低技术创新门槛。
titleZh: 打破技术数据壁垒！
titleEn: Breaking Down Tech Data Barriers! Zhihuixin Research Officially Announces: Advanced Search + AI Deep Analysis, Now Free for Individuals!
descriptionZh: 智汇信研究院向个人用户免费开放其高级搜索和人工智能深度分析的核心功能，包括人工智能专利检索、人工智能辅助阅读、图表分析、多智能体协作等，赋能高效研发和情报分析，降低技术创新门槛。
descriptionEn: Zhihuixin Research opens its core features of advanced search and AI deep analysis to individual users for free, including AI-powered patent search, AI-assisted reading, chart analysis, and multi-agent collaboration, empowering efficient R&D and intelligence analysis while lowering the threshold for technological innovation.
